name: Specter
languages: understands all languages it knew in life but can't speak

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.text: The specter can move through other creatures and objects as difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object. (Implemented: the pather passes through walls and creatures.)

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.text: [UNSUPPORTED] While in sunlight, the specter has disadvantage on attack rolls and Perception checks relying on sight.

strategy: Phase through walls and allies to reach the softest target, then drain its life; retreat into solid cover when threatened.
